theme_and_archetype.theme: hybrid (Dark Homepage & Admin, Light Inner Pages)
theme_and_archetype.archetype: Archetype 7 (Electric & Neon) adapted for LocalCoinSwap P2P Trading
theme_and_archetype.reasoning: The user explicitly requested a hybrid theme with a dark black homepage featuring purple and blue background blobs, combined with light gray inner pages and a dark admin dashboard. This demands a custom approach borrowing from high-contrast Web3 aesthetics but anchoring it with functional, approachable light pages for complex trading tables.

component_strategies.buttons: Pill-shaped (rounded-full). Primary buttons should use the exact #4F8EF7 blue. Hover states should slightly darken the background or add a subtle glow.
component_strategies.cards: For the light inner pages, use clean white cards (#FFFFFF) with very subtle shadows (shadow-sm) on the light gray background (#F0F2F5). For dark pages, use #141414 with 1px border-white/5.
component_strategies.homepage_blobs: Use fixed or absolute positioning with large width/height, border-radius 50%, bg-gradient-to-r, and filter: blur(120px) to create the ambient purple and blue blobs requested by the user. Place purple on the left and blue on the right.
component_strategies.tables: Use Shadcn Table components. High contrast between headers and rows. Ensure the buy/sell buttons within the table are prominent.
component_strategies.forms: Use Shadcn Forms with Inputs, Selects, etc. Form inputs should have rounded-xl borders.
component_strategies.trade_chat: A split layout. Left (or lg:col-span-8): Chat interface with message bubbles. Right (or lg:col-span-4): Trade details, status, payment info, and action buttons.
component_strategies.navigation: Sticky glassmorphism header. backdrop-blur-xl bg-black/60 for the dark homepage, bg-white/70 for light pages. Must contain a prominent CTA for 'Create Offer'.

motion_and_interactions.hover_states: Cards should have a subtle upward transform (-translate-y-1) and increased shadow. Buttons must have clearly defined hover colors.
motion_and_interactions.chat: New messages should slide up and fade in.
motion_and_interactions.accessibility: Respect prefers-reduced-motion. Ensure all focus states have ring-2 ring-primary offset.

pages_to_build.name: Homepage
pages_to_build.details: Dark black background. Left purple blob (#9D4CDD), right blue blob (#4F8EF7). Stats bar. Crypto listing table with Buy/Sell pill buttons. Network cards for Ethereum, BSC, Tron.

pages_to_build.name: Buy/Sell USDT Pages
pages_to_build.details: Light gray background (#f0f2f5). Clean tables with filters (currency, payment method, amount). White cards.

pages_to_build.name: Trade Page
pages_to_build.details: Split layout. Interactive chat UI with another user. Real-time feel. Trade details and release/cancel action buttons.

pages_to_build.name: Create Offer
pages_to_build.details: Multi-step or single-page form to create a buy/sell offer. Pricing strategy, limits, and payment methods.

pages_to_build.name: User Dashboard
pages_to_build.details: Overview of active trades, past history, wallet balances, user profile, and notifications.

pages_to_build.name: Admin Dashboard
pages_to_build.details: Dark themed for admins. Manage users, oversee trades, handle dispute resolutions.

icons.instructions: Use lucide-react for standard UI icons. For crypto logos (USDT, ETH, BTC, TRX, BNB), try to use simple colored SVG components directly or lucide-react approximations if SVGs are unavailable.

testing.data_testid_requirement: All interactive and key informational elements MUST include a data-testid attribute using kebab-case, role-based naming (e.g., data-testid='buy-usdt-button', data-testid='chat-message-input').

instructions_to_main_agent: Build the application using React and Tailwind CSS.
Ensure the homepage has a strict dark theme (#0A0A0A) with the requested CSS blur blobs (purple on left, blue on right) behind the main hero and content.
Implement the 'pill-shaped' buttons using `rounded-full` everywhere a button appears.
For the inner pages (Buy/Sell, Trade, Create Offer, Dashboard), strictly use light mode with a #F0F2F5 background and #FFFFFF cards.
The Admin dashboard must be entirely dark-themed.
Construct the trade page with a split layout: Chat interface on one side, Trade details on the other.
Use Chivo for all headings and Inter for body text.
The color #4F8EF7 is the primary blue. Use it for the primary CTAs, active states, and links.
